items.title: [Puybertier] Zaccharie Risacher: “It was a pretty frustrating season because the playing time I got just kept decreasing,”
items.author: KD_AshyAnkles
items.body_excerpt: Revisiting his declining minutes with the Atlanta Hawks in the NBA, Zaccharie Risacher opened up about his complicated sophomore journey. In a recent interview on beIN Sports, relayed by BeBasket on Wednesday, the 21-year-old forward admitted that he felt a bit lost as the…

items.title: Zaccharie Risacher: 'I belong on an NBA court. There’s no doubt about that'
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Zaccharie Risacher: 'I belong on an NBA court. There’s no doubt about that' HoopsHype
